body: p99 on /search is creeping past 800ms under pilot load. Need this under 400ms before Northstar beta widens. Megan to scope the index changes.
title: Reduce p99 latency on /search endpoint

body: Pilot users are dropping at the email verification step. Funnel shows a 22% fall-off here. Need event instrumentation before we change the flow.
title: Onboarding flow stalls on email step

body: Design system needs dark-mode color tokens before the Northstar dashboard ships. Tomoko owns the token set.
title: Add dark mode tokens to design system

body: Legacy logs are unstructured plaintext, making incident triage slow. Migrate to structured JSON logging across platform services.
title: Migrate legacy logs to structured format

body: Dashboard renders a blank panel when a pilot account has no data yet. Need a proper empty state with onboarding guidance.
title: Handle empty state on Northstar dashboard

body: Data pipeline has no liveness probe, so failed ETL runs go unnoticed until reports are stale. Add a health check endpoint.
title: Add health check endpoint to data pipeline

body: Auth library flagged for a security advisory. Bump to patched version and re-run the dependency audit.
title: Update auth library to patch CVE

body: We want to roll v2 endpoints to 5% of traffic first. Set up a canary release path in the gateway.
title: Set up canary release for v2 endpoints

body: On-call needs a written runbook for deploys and rollbacks. Document the new pipeline before the freeze.
title: Document new deployment runbook

body: Cohort retention numbers in the analytics panel disagree with the warehouse query. Reconcile the metric definition.
title: Reconcile retention metric with warehouse

body: Pilot feedback: the dashboard date-range picker is confusing on mobile. Redesign the control.
title: Redesign date-range picker for mobile

body: Add cursor-based pagination to /events so large pilot accounts can page through history without timeouts.
title: Add cursor pagination to /events

body: Export-to-CSV in the dashboard times out for accounts over 100k rows. Stream the export instead of buffering.
title: Stream CSV export for large accounts

body: Add a feature-flag-gated A/B test for the new activation checklist. Need it instrumented for the growth experiment.
title: Instrument A/B test for activation checklist

body: SSO logins intermittently return 503 during peak. Investigate the auth service connection limits.
title: Auth service 503s for SSO logins

body: The Northstar dashboard charts fail WCAG contrast checks in light mode. Adjust palette before the pilot review.
title: Fix chart color contrast for accessibility

body: Dashboard cold-start render is 3.5s for Arcadia Retail's largest workspace. Prefetch the default date range and lazy-load secondary charts. Megan to profile the initial paint.
title: Speed up Northstar dashboard cold-start render

body: New accounts stall at the workspace-naming step before they ever reach a dashboard. Instrument the step and add an inline default so activation isn't blocked.
title: Onboarding stalls at workspace-naming step

body: Chart legends overflow and clip at narrow breakpoints on the Northstar dashboard. Need responsive legend tokens before the pilot review. Tomoko owns the spec.
title: Add responsive legend tokens for chart breakpoints

body: Export job traces are scattered across three services with no shared request id, so debugging a failed CSV export means stitching logs by hand. Add trace propagation through the export path.
title: Add trace propagation through CSV export path
